calculated.field_65b2423dfc838: {field:input_company_name} Limited is a [company/business] which provides various technology based services [and/or software]. This Master Services Contract (MSC) comprises of the terms and conditions contained in this MSC, together with the Contract Details page and each of the Schedules which are relevant to the Software and/or Services You purchase through Us. Each time You purchase Software and/or Services through Us, We shall agree with You in writing an [Order Form and/or a Change Control Note] setting out the details of the Software and/or Services You are to acquire. If You proceed with such purchase the terms of this MSC and the relevant Schedule(s) shall apply to the additional Software and/or Services You have acquired. If necessary, We may update the Contract Details page to include any information which is relevant to future purchases You make. We shall agree such updates with You in writing.

calculated.field_65b244a12dd04:
The Conditions

1. INTERPRETATION

1.1 The definitions and rules of interpretation in this clause apply in the Contract.

Affiliate;

in relation to a party, any entity controlling, controlled by or under common control with such party and “control” shall have the meaning given to it in section 1124 of the Corporation Tax Act 2010.

Change;

any change both of Us agree in writing to make to the Software and/or Services.
these conditions.

Confidential Information;

information belonging to or relating to a party’s business which is identified as confidential information or which might reasonably be considered confidential given the circumstance of its disclosure or use, including (but not limited to) any documents We produce for You as part of the Professional Services.

Contract Details;

the Contract Details page at the beginning of this Contract.

Contract;

the Contract made between You and Us for provision of Software and/or the Services, comprising these Conditions, the Contract Details, the Schedule(s) which are relevant to the Software and/or Services purchased by You from Us, the Order Form(s) and where applicable, any Change.

Controller, processor, data subject, personal data, personal data breach, processing and appropriate technical and organisational measures;

as defined in the Data Protection Legislation.

Customer Data;

the data supplied by You to Us for the purpose of the providing the Software, and/or Services.

Data Protection Legislation;

means:

(a) to the extent that the UK GDPR applies, the law of the United Kingdom or of a part of the United Kingdom which relates to the protection of personal data.

(b) to the extent that the EU GDPR applies, the law of the European Union or any member state of the European Union to which We or You are subject which relates to the protection of personal data.

Deliverables;

the deliverables described in the Statement of Work and/or a Change which We create for You as a result of the Professional Services.

EU GDPR;

the General Data Protection Regulation ((EU) 2016/679), as it has effect in EU law.

Fees;

the fees payable by You to Us for the Software and/or Services, as set out in the Order Form and/or a Change.

Hosting Services;

any hosting services provided by Us to You, subject to these Conditions and the terms of Schedule 4.

Intellectual Property Rights;

all patents, copyright and related rights, trade marks, business names, rights goodwill, the right to sue for passing off, rights in designs, database rights, rights to use and protect the confidentiality of Confidential Information (including know-how) and all other intellectual property rights, registered or unregistered, which exist now or in the future in any part of the world.

{field:input_order_form};

An {field:input_order_form} agreed by both of us in writing confirming the Services and/or Software to be supplied by Us to You under such {field:input_order_form}, and the Fees payable for such Services / Software.
